---
title: "Bulk RNASeq - GSE263594"
author: "Dana Krauß"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
    workflowr::wflow_html:
        code_folding: hide
        df_print: paged
        toc: true
        toc_float: true
        toc_depth: 5
        theme:
          bootswatch: "flatly"
          primary: "#2C3E50"
          secondary: "#1B9E77"
          text-primary: "#D0006F"
          text-secondary: "#D0006F"
        self_contained: true  
    html_document:
        self_contained: true
params: 
  project: "DESeq2_AKP_AKPE_AP"   
  user_dir: "/Krauss_et_al_2025_GSE263594" 
  script_number: !r c("01-")
  dataset: "GSE263594"
  condition: "group"
  covariate: !r c(NULL)
  exclude: !r c(NULL)
  level: !r c("AKP", "AKPE","AP")
  contrast: !r list(AKPE_vs_AKP = c("group", "AKPE","AKP"),
                    AP_vs_AKP = c("group", "AP", "AKP"),
                    AKPE_vs_AP = c("group", "AKPE","AP"))
  fdr_cutoff: 0.1
  fc_cutoff: 1
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---


```{r warning=FALSE, child="00-project_info.Rmd"}
## pull all relevant project information into current script
```


# Libraries



```{r libraries, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, cache=FALSE, include=TRUE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
 fig.width = 6,
 fig.asp = 0.8,
 out.width = "80%"
)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
# Packages required
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(DESeq2)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(writexl)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(IHW)
library(UpSetR)
library(Rfunctions)
library(progeny)
library(ggVennDiagram)
library(eulerr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggrepel)

  
### pull variables from params into environment
script_number <- params$script_number
project <- params$project
tag <- paste0(script_number,project)

user_dir <- paste0(Sys.getenv("USER_DIR"),params$user_dir) 
plots_dir <- paste0(user_dir,"/plots")
results_dir <- paste0(user_dir,"/results")
scripts_dir <- paste0(user_dir,"/scripts")
data_dir <- paste0(user_dir,"/data")

condition <- params$condition
covariate <- params$covariate
dataset <- params$dataset
contrasts <- params$contrast
level = params$level
exclude <- params$exclude
fdr_cutoff <-  params$fdr_cutoff 
fc_cutoff <-  params$fc_cutoff 



if (is.null(covariate)) {
  design_formula <- as.formula(paste0("~ ", condition))
} else {
  design_formula <- as.formula(paste0("~ ", covariate, " + ", condition))
}


custom_cols <- list(col_sel = get_colors(),
                    color_vec = c("#000000", "#941B19", "#7F7F7F"),
                    group = c('AKP' = '#000000', 'AKPE' = '#941B19',"AP" = "#7F7F7F")
                    )


gene_id_type = "SYMBOL" #for mapping

set.seed(1414)
```


------------------------------------------------------------------------


# 0 - Load Data


Please provide an meta file that contains columns called

-   sample_ID = colnames of countmatrix
-   group = for contrasts/comparisons

```{r loading, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, eval = T, results='hide'}
# read in metadata

sampleAnno <- tibble::tribble(
  ~sample,     ~group, ~replicate,
  "AKP_REP1",  "AKP",  1,
  "AKP_REP2",  "AKP",  2,
  "AKP_REP3",  "AKP",  3,
  "AKPE_REP1", "AKPE", 1,
  "AKPE_REP2", "AKPE", 2,
  "AKPE_REP3", "AKPE", 3,
  "AP_REP1",   "AP",   1,
  "AP_REP2",   "AP",   2,
  "AP_REP3",   "AP",   3,
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(row_names = sample) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("row_names")




## read GSE count matrix file

GEOquery::getGEOSuppFiles(dataset, baseDir = data_dir)
count_mat <- read.csv(list.files(file.path(data_dir, dataset), 
                                 full.names = TRUE))

# columns(org.Mm.eg.db)

annotation = AnnotationDbi::select(
              org.Mm.eg.db, count_mat$gene_id %>% 
              unique(), 
              keytype = gene_id_type, 
              columns = c("SYMBOL", "ENTREZID", "GENENAME", "ENSEMBL")) %>%
              distinct(across(!!gene_id_type), .keep_all = TRUE)

# check if there are NA's in SYMBOL
length(which(is.na(annotation$SYMBOL)))
# check if there are duplicated terms
which(duplicated(annotation$SYMBOL)) 


counts = count_mat %>%
  select(c(gene_id, sampleAnno[["sample"]])) %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene_id") %>%
  round() # salmon does not necessarily contain integers
colnames(counts)


# Check if annotation matches
print(c("All counts colnames correspond to sampleAnnotation Rownames?",paste0(all(colnames(counts)==rownames(sampleAnno)))))

saveRDS(counts, file.path(data_dir, paste0(tag,"_count_mat.RDS")))
```

## SampleAnnotation used
```{r}
DT::datatable(data.frame(sampleAnno),
              extensions = 'Buttons',
            options = list(dom = 'Blfrtip',
                           buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel'),
                           pageLength = 5,           # Show 5 rows by default
                scrollX = TRUE,
                           lengthMenu = list(c(10,25,50,-1),
                                             c(10,25,50,"All"))),
            )

```




---------------------------------------------------------------------



# 1 - DESeq2 Analysis

## Count distribution

```{r, warning=FALSE}
###Plot count distribution
p1 <- ggplot(counts) +
  geom_histogram(aes(x = counts[[1]]), stat = "bin", bins = 200) +
  xlab("Raw expression counts") +
  ylab("Number of genes")


###Plot mean vs. variance
mean_counts <- rowMeans(counts)
variance_counts <- apply(counts[,1:3], 1, var)

df <- data.frame(mean_counts, variance_counts)
p2 <- ggplot(df) +
        geom_point(aes(x=mean_counts, y=variance_counts)) + 
        scale_y_log10(limits = c(1,1e9)) +
        scale_x_log10(limits = c(1,1e9)) +
        geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, color="red")

cowplot::plot_grid(p1, p2)
```


```{r eval=T, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=T, fig.width=8}
################# Start processing
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts,
                              colData = sampleAnno,
                              design = design_formula)


# in case you want to exclude some samples
if (!is.null(exclude)) {
  dds <-  dds[,!dds$sample %in% c(exclude)]
} 



head(counts(dds))[1:4,]

## keep only genes where we have >= 10 reads per samplecondition in total
keep <- rowSums(counts(collapseReplicates(dds, dds[[condition]]))) >= 10
dds <- dds[keep,]


# run DESeq
dds <- DESeq(dds) # includes estimateSizeFactors(),estimateDispersion(),nbinomWaldTest()

plotDispEsts(dds)

saveRDS(dds, file.path(data_dir,paste0(tag ,"_dds_DESeq2.rds")))
```




---------------------------------------------------------------------



# 2 - Unsupervised Clustering {.tabset .tabset-pills}

#### Effects of transformations on the variance

```{r, fig.width=6}
# Get normalized counts
vst <- vst(dds, blind = FALSE)

# this gives log2(n + 1)
ntd <- normTransform(dds)


vsn::meanSdPlot(assay(ntd))
vsn::meanSdPlot(assay(vst))
```




#### PCA Plots {.tabset .tabset-pills}
As in [Fig 3](https://media.springernature.com/full/springer-static/image/art%3A10.1038%2Fs44321-025-00240-4/MediaObjects/44321_2025_240_Fig3_HTML.png?as=webp)

```{r,eval=T, results='hide',fig.width = 12, fig.asp=0.6}
## custom pca plots as in Fig. 3A
plotPCA(vst, 
        intgroup = "group",
        ntop = nrow(vst)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_cols$color_vec) +  
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.6),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.2)
  )

```



```{r,eval=T, results='hide',fig.width = 12, fig.asp=0.6}

cd <- as.data.frame(colData(vst))
vars <- colnames(cd)[
  colnames(cd) != "sizeFactor" &
    !vapply(cd, function(x) is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x), logical(1))
]

pca_plots <- vars %>%
  purrr::map(function(var) {
    plotPCA(vst, intgroup = var,ntop = nrow(vst)) + 
      scale_color_manual(values = get_colors()) +
      ggtitle(paste("PCA colored by", var))
  })
names(pca_plots) <- vars

src_list <- lapply(names(pca_plots), function(x) {
    src <- c("##### {{x}} {.unnumbered}",
             "```{r PCA2-{{x}}}",
             "pca_plots[['{{paste0(x)}}']]",
             "```",
             "")
    knit_expand(text = src)
})
out <- knit_child(text = unlist(src_list), options = list(cache = FALSE))
```
`r out`



#### CorrelationMaps & Dendrogram

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
###### Correlationmap
vst_cor <- cor(assay(vst))


pheatmap::pheatmap(vst_cor, 
         intgroup = paste0(condition) ,
         color = rev(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu")), 
         fontsize = 10, 
         fontsize_row = 10, 
         height=20)



#Unsupervised clustering
plot(hclust(dist(t(assay(vst)))))

```




### GOI counts  {.tabset}

```{r GOI counts, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plot_GOI <- data.frame(counts(dds, normalized=TRUE)) %>% rownames_to_column("gene_name") 
plot_GOI <- plot_GOI %>% filter(gene_name %in% c("Egfr","Smoc2")) %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene_name") %>% t() %>% data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("sample") %>% left_join(sampleAnno %>% add_column(sample = rownames(sampleAnno))) 


plot_GOI <- plot_GOI %>% arrange(factor(condition, levels = level))
```

#### Egfr

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggstatsplot::ggbetweenstats(
  data = plot_GOI,
  x = group,
  y = Egfr, # EDIT
  ylab = "Egfr counts", #EDIT
  title = "Egfr" #EDIT
)
```


#### Smoc2

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggstatsplot::ggbetweenstats(
  data = plot_GOI,
  x = group,
  y = Smoc2, # EDIT
  ylab = "Smoc2 counts", #EDIT
  title = "Smoc2" #EDIT
)
```

```{r}
#https://martinctc.github.io/blog/vignette-downloadable-tables-in-rmarkdown-with-the-dt-package/

DT::datatable(plot_GOI,
              extensions = 'Buttons',
            options = list(dom = 'Blfrtip',
                           buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel'),
                           pageLength = 10,           # Show 10 rows by default
                scrollX = TRUE,
                           lengthMenu = list(c(10,25,50,-1),
                                             c(10,25,50,"All"))),
            )

```

------------------------------------------------------------------------


# 3 - Results

## Hypothesis Testing {.tabset .tabset-pills}

**Run Contrasts**: Creates all_results & all_extracted lists

```{r}
### Define functions
run_deseq_results <- function(dds, contrast) {

  

  res_unshrunk <- results(
    dds,
    contrast  = contrast,
    test      = "Wald",
    filterFun = ihw
  )

  res_shr <- lfcShrink(
    dds,
    contrast = contrast,
    type     = "normal",
    res      = res_unshrunk
  )

  ## Preserve Wald statistic explicitly
  res_shr$stat <- res_unshrunk$stat

  attr(res_shr, "contrast_label") <- paste(contrast, collapse = "_")

  res_shr
}


extract_and_export <- function(dds, result, tag, results_dir,
                               fdr_cutoff, fc_cutoff,contrast) {

  ## ---- subset dds to contrast groups ----
  contrast_samples <- as.data.frame(colData(dds)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(group %in% contrast[2:3]) %>%
    rownames()
  dds_sub <- dds[, contrast_samples]
  
  ## ---- DE results table ----
  res_tbl <- result %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("SYMBOL") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(pvalue)

  res_sig <- res_tbl %>%
    dplyr::filter(padj < fdr_cutoff)

  res_sig_fc <- res_sig %>%
    dplyr::filter(abs(log2FoldChange) > fc_cutoff)

  ## ---- normalized counts ----
  nc <- counts(dds, normalized = TRUE) %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("SYMBOL")

  nc_sig <- nc %>%
    dplyr::filter(SYMBOL %in% res_sig$SYMBOL)

  nc_sig_fc <- nc %>%
    dplyr::filter(SYMBOL %in% res_sig_fc$SYMBOL)

  ## ---- collect outputs ----
  de_res_list <- list(
    allGenes   = res_tbl,
    sigGenes   = res_sig,
    sigFCgenes = res_sig_fc
  )

  de_nc_list <- list(
    allGenes   = nc,
    sigGenes   = nc_sig,
    sigFCgenes = nc_sig_fc
  )

  ## ---- write DE results Excel ----
  res_tbl %>%
    list(all_results = .) %>%
    writexl::write_xlsx(
      path = file.path(results_dir, paste0(tag, "_all_results.xlsx"))
    )

  ### ---- export count tables ----
dir.create(
  file.path(results_dir, tag),
  recursive = TRUE,
  showWarnings = FALSE
)

  export_counts <- list(
    # full experiment (all samples)
    RawCounts_allSamples        = counts(dds, normalized = FALSE) %>%
      tibble::as_tibble(rownames = "SYMBOL"),
    NormCounts_allSamples       = counts(dds, normalized = TRUE) %>%
      tibble::as_tibble(rownames = "SYMBOL"),
    # contrast samples only
    RawCounts_contrastSamples   = counts(dds_sub, normalized = FALSE) %>%
      tibble::as_tibble(rownames = "SYMBOL"),
    NormCounts_contrastSamples  = counts(dds_sub, normalized = TRUE) %>%
      tibble::as_tibble(rownames = "SYMBOL")
  )

writexl::write_xlsx(
  export_counts,
  file.path(results_dir, tag, "counts_lists.xlsx")
)

  list(
    de_res        = de_res_list,
    de_nc         = de_nc_list,
    count_tables  = export_counts
  )
}
```


```{r}
## Run deseq2 results generating all_results
all_results <- list()
for (contrast_name in names(contrasts)) {

  message("Running: ", contrast_name)

  contrast <- contrasts[[contrast_name]]

  results_dir_i <- file.path(results_dir, contrast_name)
  dir.create(results_dir_i, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  res <- run_deseq_results(
    dds      = dds,
    contrast = contrast
  )


  all_results[[contrast_name]] <- res

  saveRDS(
    res,
    file.path(results_dir_i, paste0(contrast_name, "_res.RDS"))
  )
}





## extract 

all_extracted <- purrr::map(
  names(contrasts),
  function(contrast_name) {

    res <- readRDS(
      file.path(
        results_dir,
        contrast_name,
        paste0(contrast_name, "_res.RDS")
      )
    )

    extract_and_export(
      dds         = dds,
      result      = res,
      tag         = contrast_name,
      results_dir = file.path(results_dir, contrast_name),
      fdr_cutoff  = fdr_cutoff,
      fc_cutoff   = fc_cutoff,
      contrast    = contrasts[[contrast_name]]
    )
  }
) %>%
  rlang::set_names(names(contrasts))




```



### Result Lists {.tabset}
#### Comparisons {.tabset .tabset-pills}






```{r ResultsDESeq2_knit, fig.asp=0.6,  warning=FALSE, results="hide", message=FALSE}

src_list <- lapply(names(contrasts), function(x) {
    src <- c("##### DESeq2_Res_{{x}} {.unnumbered}",
             "```{r {{x}}}",
             "print('{{x}}')",
             "print(summary(all_results[['{{x}}']]))",
             "DT::datatable(all_extracted[['{{paste0(x)}}']][['de_res']][['allGenes']], extensions = 'Buttons', options = list(dom = 'Blfrtip',pageLength = 5, scrollX = TRUE,buttons = c('excel')))",
             "```",
             "")
    knit_expand(text = src)
})



out <- knit_child(text = unlist(src_list), options = list(cache = FALSE))
```

`r out`

### Theory

**Hypothesis Testing**

-   RNA-seq exhibits overdispersion (variance\>mean) -\> statistical distribution needs to account
-   NB Distribution

![](https://hbctraining.github.io/DGE_workshop_salmon/img/NB_model_formula.png)

*Wald test*

-   usually for parameters estimated by maximum likelihood
-   testing each gene model coefficient (LFC) Steps:
-   LFC divided by SE -\> z-statistic
-   z-stats compared to normal distribution, compute p-val

*Multiple Testing*

-   inflation of false positive rate
-   FDR/BH is integrated in DESeq2


Extract and save results contain:

-   baseMean: mean of normalized counts for all samples
-   log2FoldChange: log2 fold change
-   lfcSE: standard error
-   stat: Wald statistic
-   pvalue: Wald test p-value
-   padj: BH adjusted p-values

## Plot Comparisons
### N° of DEG genes {.tabset .tabset-pills}
#### padj <0.1

```{r, NoGenes,fig.width = 12}
de.list <- lapply(all_extracted, function(x) x$de_res$sigGenes)

de.summary <- de.list %>%
    map2_df(names(de.list), ~ mutate(.x, Comparison = .y)) %>%
    mutate(IsUp = log2FoldChange > 0) %>%
    group_by(Comparison) %>%
    summarise(Up = sum(IsUp), Down = sum(!IsUp)) %>%
    mutate(Down = -Down) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(Up, Down), names_to = "Direction", values_to = "Count") %>%
    mutate(Comparison = factor(Comparison, levels = names(de.list)))

ggplot(de.summary,
       aes(x = fct_rev(Comparison), y = Count, fill = Direction)) +
    geom_col() +
    geom_text(aes(y = Count + sign(Count) * max(abs(Count)) * 0.07,
                  label = abs(Count)),
              size = 6, colour = "grey25") +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#377eb8", "#e41a1c")) +
    ggtitle("Number of identified genes (padj < 0.1)") +
    theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
          axis.line = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "bottom")



```

#### padj < 0.05 & |log2FC| > 1
```{r,fig.width = 12}

de.summary.strict <- de.list %>%
    map2_df(names(de.list), ~ mutate(.x, Comparison = .y)) %>%
    # apply stricter filters
    filter(padj < 0.05, abs(log2FoldChange) > 1) %>%
    mutate(IsUp = log2FoldChange > 1) %>%           # upregulated
    mutate(IsDown = log2FoldChange < -1) %>%        # downregulated
    group_by(Comparison) %>%
    summarise(
        Up = sum(IsUp),
        Down = sum(IsDown)
    ) %>%
    mutate(Down = -Down) %>%  # make Down negative for the plot
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
        cols = c(Up, Down),
        names_to = "Direction",
        values_to = "Count"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
        Comparison = factor(Comparison, levels = names(de.list))
    )

ggplot(de.summary.strict,
       aes(x = fct_rev(Comparison), y = Count, fill = Direction)) +
    geom_col() +
    geom_text(aes(y = Count + sign(Count) * max(abs(Count)) * 0.07,
                  label = abs(Count)),
              size = 6, colour = "grey25") +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#377eb8", "#e41a1c")) +
    ggtitle("Number of identified genes (padj < 0.05 & |log2FC| > 1)") +
    theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
          axis.line = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "bottom")




```

### Upset Plots


A single filled dot = elements unique to that set

How to read upsetPlots:

-   One filled dot → set-specific genes
-   Two filled dots → genes shared only by those two sets
-   Three filled dots → genes shared by all three
```{r}

upset_data <- lapply(X = all_results, FUN = function(x) {
  x <- x %>%
    base::data.frame() %>%
    filter(padj < 0.1) %>%
    rownames_to_column("Gene") %>%
    dplyr::select(Gene = Gene, LogFC = log2FoldChange, pVal = padj) %>%
    arrange(desc(LogFC)) %>% pull(Gene)
})



colorbar <- get_colors()[1:length(names(upset_data))]
upset(fromList(upset_data),
      order.by = "freq",
      nsets = length(colorbar),
      sets.bar.color = colorbar)
```




### Venn {.tabset .tabset-pills}
#### Overview

```{r,fig.width = 12, eval = T}

# padj < 0.1
venn_0.1 <- lapply(X = all_results, FUN = function(x) {
  x %>%
    base::data.frame() %>%
    dplyr::filter(padj < 0.1) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("Gene") %>%
    dplyr::select(Gene, LogFC = log2FoldChange, pVal = padj) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(LogFC)) %>%
    dplyr::pull(Gene)
})



ggVennDiagram(venn_0.1, label_alpha = 0) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "steelblue") +
  theme_void() +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

```

#### Proportional
```{r,fig.width = 12, eval = T}




fit <- euler(venn_0.1)

plot(fit,
     fills = list(fill = c("steelblue", "lightgrey", "lightblue"),
                  alpha = 0.5),
     edges = TRUE,
     quantities = TRUE)

```


---------------------------------------------------------------------





### All Count Tables {.tabset .tabset-pills}


```{r CountTables_all, fig.asp=0.6, fig.width=12,warning=FALSE, results="hide", message=FALSE}

src_list <- lapply(names(all_extracted), function(contrast_name) {

  export_counts <- all_extracted[[contrast_name]]$count_tables

  ## build one tabset per contrast
  src <- c(
    paste0("#### CountTables ", contrast_name, " {.tabset .tabset-pills}"),
    ""
  )

  ## build tabs inside each contrast
  tabs <- lapply(c("RawCounts_contrastSamples","NormCounts_contrastSamples"), function(x) {
    c(
      paste0("##### ", x, " {.unnumbered}"),
      paste0("```{r ", contrast_name, "_", x, "}"),
      paste0(
        "DT::datatable(",
        "all_extracted[['", contrast_name, "']]$count_tables[['", x, "']], ",
        "extensions = 'Buttons', ",
        "options = list(dom = 'Blfrtip', buttons = c('excel'))",
        ")"
      ),
      "```",
      ""
    )
  })

  c(src, unlist(tabs))
})

out <- knit_child(text = unlist(src_list), options = list(cache = FALSE))

```

`r out`





---------------------------------------------------------------------



# 4 - Plots

```{r, eval = F}
all_results <- purrr::map(
  names(contrasts),
  function(contrast_name) {

    readRDS(
      file.path(
        results_dir,
        contrast_name,
        paste0(contrast_name, "_res.RDS")
      )
    )
  }
) %>%
  rlang::set_names(names(contrasts))

```



#### Volcano Plots {.tabset .tabset-pills}
As in [Fig 3](https://media.springernature.com/full/springer-static/image/art%3A10.1038%2Fs44321-025-00240-4/MediaObjects/44321_2025_240_Fig3_HTML.png?as=webp)
```{r}


make_volcano_data <- function(res,
                              fdr_cutoff = 0.05,
                              fc_cutoff  = 0.25) {

  as.data.frame(res) %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
    mutate(
      significant = padj < fdr_cutoff & abs(log2FoldChange) > fc_cutoff,
      direction = case_when(
        log2FoldChange >  fc_cutoff & padj < fdr_cutoff ~ "Upregulated",
        log2FoldChange < -fc_cutoff & padj < fdr_cutoff ~ "Downregulated",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(padj))
}

make_volcano_plot <- function(df,
                              title,
                              fdr_cutoff = 0.05,
                              fc_cutoff  = 0.25) {

  ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = direction), alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +

    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        Upregulated   = "red3",# "#E64B35" "darkblue", "gray50", "red3"
        Downregulated = "darkblue",#darkblue #"#4DBBD5"
        `Not significant` = "gray50"
      )
    ) +

    geom_vline(
      xintercept = c(-fc_cutoff, fc_cutoff),
      linetype = "dashed",
      color = "grey30"
    ) +
    geom_hline(
      yintercept = -log10(fdr_cutoff),
      linetype = "dashed",
      color = "grey30"
    ) +
    
    ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
      data = df %>% filter(padj < 0.001, abs(log2FoldChange) > 0.5),
      aes(label = gene),
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = 20,
      label.size = 0.2,        # thin box line
      label.padding = unit(0.15, "lines"),
      fill = "white",
      color = "black"
      ) +

    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "log2 Fold Change",
      y = "-log10(adjusted P-value)",
      color = ""
    ) +

    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
    )
}
```


```{r}
### create all volcano plots from contrast list
volcano_plots <- purrr::imap(
  all_results,
  function(res, contrast_name) {

    df <- make_volcano_data(
      res,
      fdr_cutoff = fdr_cutoff,
      fc_cutoff  = fc_cutoff
    )

    make_volcano_plot(
      df,
      title = contrast_name,
      fdr_cutoff = fdr_cutoff,
      fc_cutoff  = fc_cutoff
    )
  }
)
```


```{r VolcanoPlots, fig.asp=0.8,  fig.width = 12,warning=FALSE, results="hide", message=FALSE}

src_list <- lapply(names(contrasts), function(x) {
    src <- c("##### Volcano-{{x}} {.unnumbered}",
             "```{r Volcano-{{x}}}",
             "print('{{x}}')",
              "volcano_plots[['{{paste0(x)}}']]",  
             "```",
             "")
    knit_expand(text = src)
})



out <- knit_child(text = unlist(src_list), options = list(cache = FALSE))
```

`r out`



---------------------------------------------------------------------




## Heatmaps


Wrapper Functions
```{r}

## create functions
make_simple_heatmap <- function(nc_df,
                                annot_df,
                                annot_subset = c("group"),
                                group_colors = NULL, # list of colors e.g. list= c(AKP="#F94040", ...)
                                file = NULL,
                                cluster_columns  = TRUE,
                                cluster_rows  = TRUE,
                                width = 8,
                                height = 10) {
  
  if (is.null(nc_df) || nrow(nc_df) < 2) return(NULL)
  
  mat <- nc_df %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("SYMBOL") %>%
    as.matrix()
  
  # Match samples
  common_samples <- intersect(colnames(mat), rownames(annot_df))
  mat   <- mat[, common_samples, drop = FALSE]
  annot <- annot_df[common_samples, , drop = FALSE]
  # Keep only group
  annot <- annot[, annot_subset, drop = FALSE]
  
  
  if (!is.null(file)) {
    pdf(file, width = width, height = height)
  }
  
  p <- pheatmap::pheatmap(
    mat,
    scale = "row",
    color = rev(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu")), 
    cluster_rows = cluster_rows,
    cluster_cols = cluster_columns,
    show_rownames = FALSE,
    show_colnames = FALSE,
    annotation_colors = group_colors,          # named vector e.g. c(AKP="#F94040", ...)
    annotation_col = annot,
    border_color = NA
  )
  
  if (!is.null(file)) dev.off()
  
  return(p)
}




make_advanced_heatmap <- function(
  nc_df,
  annot_df,
  group_column,
  group_colors     = NULL,          # named vector e.g. c(AKP="#F94040", ...)
  file             = NULL,
  width            = 8,
  height           = 10,
  cols             = colorRampPalette(c("#0a3a78", "black", "#fefe2a"))(100), #rev(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))
  zlim             = c(-2, 2),
  row_km           = NULL,
  cluster_columns  = TRUE,
  cluster_rows     = TRUE,
  show_row_names = FALSE,
  row_split_df = NULL,      
  row_split_column = NULL
) {
  
  # --- Input validation ---
  if (is.null(nc_df) || nrow(nc_df) < 2) {
    message("Skipping heatmap: fewer than 2 rows.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  
  # --- Prepare matrix ---
  mat <- nc_df %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("SYMBOL") %>%
    as.matrix()
  
  # --- Optional row pathway annotation ---
  row_split <- NULL
  
  if (!is.null(row_split_df) && !is.null(row_split_column)) {
  
    row_split_df <- row_split_df %>%
      dplyr::filter(SYMBOL %in% rownames(mat))
  
    # match order to heatmap matrix
    row_split_df <- row_split_df[match(rownames(mat), row_split_df$SYMBOL), ]
  
    row_split <- row_split_df[[row_split_column]]
  }
  
  
  
  
  # Align samples between matrix and annotation
  common_samples <- intersect(colnames(mat), rownames(annot_df))
  if (length(common_samples) < 2) stop("Fewer than 2 samples overlap between matrix and annotation.")
  
  mat   <- mat[, common_samples, drop = FALSE]
  annot <- annot_df[common_samples, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # --- Scale rows (z-score per gene) ---
  mat_scaled <- t(scale(t(mat)))
  mat_scaled[is.nan(mat_scaled)] <- 0  # handle zero-variance rows
  
  # --- Color function ---
  col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(
    seq(zlim[1], zlim[2], length.out = length(cols)),
    cols
  )
  
  # --- Annotation colors ---

  group_levels <- unique(annot[[group_column]])
  # Safety loop: ensure enough colors for all groups  & Auto-generate colors if none provided
    if (is.null(group_colors) || length(group_colors) < length(group_levels)) {
      warning("group_colors missing or too few. Generating default palette.")
      group_colors <- setNames(
        scales::hue_pal()(length(group_levels)),
        group_levels
      )
    } else {
      # If colors provided, ensure all levels are covered
      missing_levels <- setdiff(group_levels, names(group_colors))
      if (length(missing_levels) > 0) {
        warning("group_colors missing some group levels: ", paste(missing_levels, collapse = ", "), 
                ". Adding default colors for missing groups.")
        additional_colors <- setNames(scales::hue_pal()(length(missing_levels)), missing_levels)
        group_colors <- c(group_colors, additional_colors)
      }
    }
  
  ann_df <- data.frame(Group = annot[[group_column]], row.names = rownames(annot))
  
  colAnn <- ComplexHeatmap::HeatmapAnnotation(
    df  = ann_df,
    col = list(Group = group_colors),
    annotation_legend_param = list(
      Group = list(
        title           = group_column,
        title_position  = "topcenter",
        title_gp        = grid::gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold"),
        labels_gp       = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11)
      )
    )
  )
  
  # --- Heatmap ---
  hmap <- ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(
    mat_scaled,
    name              = "Z-score",
    col               = col_fun,
    
    # Row options
    cluster_rows               = cluster_rows,
    show_row_dend              = TRUE,
    row_dend_width             = grid::unit(25, "mm"),
    show_row_names             = show_row_names,
    row_names_side             = "right",
    row_names_gp               = grid::gpar(fontsize = 8),
    row_km                     = row_km,
    split                      = row_split,
    cluster_row_slices         = TRUE,
    clustering_distance_rows   = function(x) as.dist(1 - cor(t(x))),
    clustering_method_rows     = "ward.D2",
    
    # Column options
    cluster_columns            = cluster_columns,
    show_column_dend           = TRUE,
    column_dend_height         = grid::unit(25, "mm"),
    show_column_names          = FALSE,
    clustering_distance_columns = function(x) as.dist(1 - cor(t(x))),
    clustering_method_columns  = "ward.D2",
    
    # Legend
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
      color_bar        = "continuous",
      legend_direction = "vertical",
      title_position   = "topcenter",
      title_gp         = grid::gpar(fontsize = 12, fontface = "bold"),
      labels_gp        = grid::gpar(fontsize = 11)
    ),
    
    top_annotation = colAnn
  )
  
  # --- Draw / export ---
  p <- ComplexHeatmap::draw(
    hmap,
    heatmap_legend_side    = "left",
    annotation_legend_side = "right"
  )
  
  if (!is.null(file)) {
    pdf(file, width = width, height = height)
    ComplexHeatmap::draw(hmap,
                         heatmap_legend_side    = "left",
                         annotation_legend_side = "right")
    dev.off()
    message("Saved to: ", file)
  }
  
  return(invisible(hmap))
}



generate_all_heatmaps <- function(all_extracted,
                                  contrasts,
                                  dds,
                                  plots_dir,
                                  gene_type = "sigGenes") {
  
  dir.create(plots_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  results_list <- purrr::imap(all_extracted, function(contrast_obj, contrast_name) {
    
    message("Processing: ", contrast_name)
    
    nc_df <- contrast_obj$de_nc[[gene_type]]
    
    if (is.null(nc_df) || nrow(nc_df) < 2) {
      message("Skipping ", contrast_name, " (not enough genes)")
      return(NULL)
    }
    
    # ---- Subset DDS ----
    contrast_vector <- contrasts[[contrast_name]]
    dds_sub <- subset_dds_by_contrast(dds, contrast_vector)
    
    annot_df <- as.data.frame(colData(dds_sub))
    rownames(annot_df) <- colnames(dds_sub)
    
    group_column <- contrast_vector[1]
    
    # ---- Create subfolder per contrast ----
    contrast_dir <- file.path(plots_dir, tag)
    dir.create(contrast_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
    
    # ---- File paths ----
    simple_file <- file.path(
      contrast_dir,
      paste0(tag,"_",contrast_name, "_", gene_type, "_simple_heatmap.pdf")
    )
    
    advanced_file <- file.path(
      contrast_dir,
      paste0(tag,"_",contrast_name, "_", gene_type, "_advanced_heatmap.pdf")
    )
    
    # ---- Generate heatmaps ----
    simple_hm <- make_simple_heatmap(
      nc_df,
      annot_df,
      group_colors = list(group = custom_cols$group),
      file = simple_file
    )
    
    advanced_hm <- make_advanced_heatmap(
      nc_df,
      annot_df,
      group_colors     = custom_cols$group,
      file = advanced_file,
      group_column = group_column,
      row_km = 2
    )
    
    list(
      simple = simple_hm,
      advanced = advanced_hm
    )
  })
  
  return(results_list)
}



subset_dds_by_contrast <- function(dds, contrast_vector) {
  
  group_column <- contrast_vector[1]
  group_1      <- contrast_vector[2]
  group_2      <- contrast_vector[3]
  
  dds[, colData(dds)[[group_column]] %in% c(group_1, group_2)]
}


```



#### Heatmap Sub-Plots {.tabset .tabset-pills}


```{r}
## run code
heatmap_results <- generate_all_heatmaps(
  all_extracted = all_extracted,
  contrasts     = contrasts,
  dds           = dds,
  plots_dir     = plots_dir,
  gene_type     = "sigGenes"   # or "sigFCgenes"
)

```




```{r heatmaps, fig.asp=0.6,  warning=FALSE, results="hide", message=FALSE}
heatmap_results_clean <- heatmap_results[
  sapply(heatmap_results, function(x)
    !is.null(x) &&
    !is.null(x$simple) &&
    !is.null(x$advanced)
  )
]



src_list <- lapply(names(heatmap_results_clean), function(x) {
    src <- c("##### Heatmap-{{x}} {.unnumbered}",
             "```{r Heatmap-{{x}}}",
             "print('{{x}}')",
              "heatmap_results_clean[['{{paste0(x)}}']][['simple']]",  
             "heatmap_results_clean[['{{paste0(x)}}']][['advanced']]",  
             "```",
             "")
    knit_expand(text = src)
})



out <- knit_child(text = unlist(src_list), options = list(cache = FALSE))
```

`r out`



---------------------------------------------------------------------




### Publication Plots  {.tabset .tabset-pills}


```{r}
# Extract count matrices for plotting
extract_symbols <- function(lst, slot) unique(unlist(lapply(lst, function(x) x$de_res[[slot]]$SYMBOL)))

SYMBOL        <- extract_symbols(all_extracted, "allGenes")
SYMBOL_sig    <- extract_symbols(all_extracted, "sigGenes")
SYMBOL_sig_FC <- extract_symbols(all_extracted, "sigFCgenes")

# Normalized counts
nc <- counts(dds, normalized = TRUE) %>%
  data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("SYMBOL")

# Filter by gene sets
nc_plot        <- nc %>% filter(SYMBOL %in% SYMBOL_sig)
nc_plot_sig    <- nc %>% filter(SYMBOL %in% SYMBOL_sig)
nc_plot_sig_fc <- nc %>% filter(SYMBOL %in% SYMBOL_sig_FC)


# annot <- as.data.frame(colData(dds)) %>% filter(group %in% (contrasts$AKPE_vs_AKP[2:3]))

# nc_df <- all_extracted$AKPE_vs_AKP$de_nc$sigFCgenes %>%
#   dplyr::select(SYMBOL, any_of(annot$sample)) %>%
#   filter(SYMBOL %in% imm1415_genes_annotated$SYMBOL)
```


#### EV3A
```{r, EV3A, fig.asp=0.8, fig.width=12}

pathways <- list(
  "G2/M"            = c("Ube2c", "Birc5", "Hmgb2", "Top2a", "Cks2", "Cenpa", "Cenpf", "Nusap1", "Prc1", "Ccnb1", "Tpx2",  "Ccna2", "Cdca3", "Mki67", "Cdk1",   "Aurka", "Spc25", "Kif23",  "Smc4", "Cenpe", "Hmmr", "Kif11", "Cdc20","Ube2s", "Cks1b"),
  "G1/S" = c("Stmn1","Dut", "Pcna", "Hells", "Ranbp1", "Mcm3", "Uhrf1", "Mcm5", "Tipin", "Rrm2", "Slbp", "Mcm6", "Gmnn", "Mcm2", "Orc6", "Mcm4", "Lig1", "Slfn9",  "Dek", "Ptma", "Rpa2", "Tyms", "Gins2", "Ppia", "E2f1", "Cdt1", "Tuba1b", 
"Ncl", "Phgdh")
)

plot_genes <- purrr::imap_dfr(pathways, ~tibble::tibble(
  SYMBOL = .x,
  PATHWAY = .y
))

plot_genes$SYMBOL  <- factor(plot_genes$SYMBOL, levels = unlist(pathways))
plot_genes$PATHWAY <- factor(plot_genes$PATHWAY, levels = names(pathways))



nc_df <- nc_plot %>%
  filter(SYMBOL %in% plot_genes$SYMBOL)



make_advanced_heatmap(
  nc_df = nc_df,
  annot_df = as.data.frame(colData(dds)),
  group_column = "group",
  group_colors = custom_cols$group,
  row_split_df = plot_genes,
  row_split_column = "PATHWAY",
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_row_names = TRUE
)




```



#### EV3B 
```{r, EV3B,  fig.asp=0.8, fig.width=12}
pathways <- list(
  "Egfr Ligands"            = c("Btc","Tgfa","Hbegf","Areg","Ereg","Egf"),
  "RTKs" = c("Egfr","Erbb2","Erbb3")
)

plot_genes <- purrr::imap_dfr(pathways, ~tibble::tibble(
  SYMBOL = .x,
  PATHWAY = .y
))

plot_genes$SYMBOL  <- factor(plot_genes$SYMBOL, levels = unlist(pathways))
plot_genes$PATHWAY <- factor(plot_genes$PATHWAY, levels = names(pathways))



nc_df <- nc_plot %>%
  filter(SYMBOL %in% plot_genes$SYMBOL)



make_advanced_heatmap(
  nc_df = nc_df,
  annot_df = as.data.frame(colData(dds)),
  group_column = "group",
  group_colors = custom_cols$group,
  row_split_df = plot_genes,
  row_split_column = "PATHWAY",
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_row_names = TRUE
)




```


#### EV3E 
```{r, EV3E,  fig.asp=0.8, fig.width=12}
pathways <- list(
  "Glycolysis / Gluconeogenesis / PPP"            = c("G6pdx",
    
    "Prps1","Rpia", "Hk1","H6pd",  "Ldhb", "G6pc3","Aldh1b1","Pklr"),
  "TCA / OXPHOS" = c("Idh1","Idh2","Idh3a","Sdhb","Sdhd","Pdk2","Pdp2","Uqcrc2","Cyc1","Ndufs2","Tcirg1","Acss1"),
    #"Fatty Acid Metabolism"        = c("Ehhadh", "Acox3", "Acads","Cpt2","Chpt1", "Cds1", "Fads1","Fads2", "Acacb","Faah","Acot11","Slc27a1","Slc27a2"),
  #"Phospholipid Metabolism"         = c( "Agps","Cept1","Enpp2","Agpat2","Agpat4","Agpat5","Pgs1"),
  "Glutamine Metabolism" = c("Aldh4a1","Gad1", "Ctps2","Nsf","Slc1a1","Glud1", "Oat","Pycr2","Ddah1")
)

plot_genes <- purrr::imap_dfr(pathways, ~tibble::tibble(
  SYMBOL = .x,
  PATHWAY = .y
))

plot_genes$SYMBOL  <- factor(plot_genes$SYMBOL, levels = unlist(pathways))
plot_genes$PATHWAY <- factor(plot_genes$PATHWAY, levels = names(pathways))





annot <- as.data.frame(colData(dds)) %>% filter(group %in% (contrasts$AKPE_vs_AKP[2:3]))

nc_df <- nc_plot %>%
  dplyr::select(SYMBOL, any_of(annot$sample)) %>%
  filter(SYMBOL %in% plot_genes$SYMBOL)



make_advanced_heatmap(
  nc_df = nc_df,
  annot_df = annot,
  group_column = "group",
  group_colors = custom_cols$group,
  row_split_df = plot_genes,
  row_split_column = "PATHWAY",
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  show_row_names = TRUE
)




```

#### 4A

```{r,  fig.asp=0.8, fig.width=12}
pathways <- list(
    "Cell differentiation / fate"            = c("Mkx","Itgb8","C1qtnf6","Hap1","Sypl","Nmral1"),
    "Cell motility / adhesion"            = c( "Limch1","Egflam","Atp1a2","Dennd2a","Slc16a12","Gper1","Tff3","Tox3","Upk3a","Gdf11","Homer2"),
    "Membrane transport"            = c("Insm1","Clstn2","Gprc5c","Fam174b","Megf9","Pisd"),
    "Metabolism"            = c("Gpr161","Pcdh18","Rhobtb3","Tcaf2","Tacc1","Dsel","B3glct","St6galnac2"),
    "Signaling"            = c("Scarf2","Pcdh19","Cxcl15","Cadps","Lpcat2","Scn5a","Akr1c19","Limd2","Zfp503","Gtf2i"),
    "WNT Signaling"            = c("Fzd2","Nkd1","Wnt16","Lrrn3","Abcb9","Trabd2b","Rgmb")

)

plot_genes <- purrr::imap_dfr(pathways, ~tibble::tibble(
  SYMBOL = .x,
  PATHWAY = .y
))

plot_genes$SYMBOL  <- factor(plot_genes$SYMBOL, levels = unlist(pathways))
plot_genes$PATHWAY <- factor(plot_genes$PATHWAY, levels = names(pathways))



nc_df <- nc_plot %>%
  filter(SYMBOL %in% plot_genes$SYMBOL)



make_advanced_heatmap(
  nc_df = nc_df,
  annot_df =  as.data.frame(colData(dds)),
  group_column = "group",
  group_colors = custom_cols$group,
  row_split_df = plot_genes,
  row_split_column = "PATHWAY",
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  show_row_names = TRUE
)


```


#### 4B 

```{r, fig.asp=0.6}
rld <- rlog(dds, blind=T)

gene_expr <- assay(rld)
gene_expr <- gene_expr[,which(colnames(gene_expr)%in% colnames(dds))]


pathways = progeny(gene_expr, 
                   scale=FALSE,
                   organism = "Mouse")

rownames(pathways) <- rld$group



controls =  rownames(pathways) == contrasts$AKPE_vs_AKP[3]
ctl_mean = apply(pathways[controls,], 2, mean)
ctl_sd = apply(pathways[controls,], 2, sd)
pathways_stat = t(apply(pathways, 1, function(x) x - ctl_mean))
pathways_stat = apply(pathways, 1, function(x) x / ctl_sd)

result = apply(pathways_stat, 1, function(x) {
    broom::tidy(lm(x ~ !controls)) %>%
        filter(term == "!controlsTRUE") %>%
        dplyr::select(-term)
})
res.table <- mutate(bind_rows(result), pathway=names(result))


plot.pathways <- progeny(gene_expr,
                    scale = TRUE, 
                    organism = "Mouse", 
                    top = 100,
                    perm = 1, 
                    verbose = FALSE)

## select significant pathways
res.sig <- res.table %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.1)

plot.sig <- plot.pathways[,res.sig$pathway]

myColor = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "BrBG"))(100) # green from here
a <- myColor[51:100]
myColor = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu"))(100) # get the red from here
b <- myColor[1:50]
myColor <- c(b,a)


nc_df <- t(plot.sig) %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("SYMBOL")

make_advanced_heatmap(
  nc_df = nc_df,
  annot_df = as.data.frame(colData(dds)),
  cols = rev(myColor),
  group_column = "group",
  zlim             = c(-1.5, 1.5),
  group_colors = custom_cols$group,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_row_names = TRUE
)




```


#### 4D

```{r,  fig.asp=0.8, fig.width=12}
pathways <- list(
    "WNT PATHWAY"            = c("Alox12", "Apcdd1","Cd244","Cubn","Dmd", "Fgd1","Fzd2", "Gdf11","Lef1","Myb","Nkd1","Rhobtb3", "Ror1","Sbspon","Sntb1","Tcf7l1","Tesc","Tox","Vim","Wif1", "Wnt10b", "Wnt16", "Wnt5b"),

    "STEM CELL SIGNALLING"            = c( "Bmp1", "Bmp7", "Cplx2","Neurog3","Prelp","Prox1", "Reg4", 
  #between
  
  "Atoh1","Bcl11b","Boc","Cachd1","Cited4","Cpn1","Ctxn1", "Dach1","Dmpk","Fads1","Gas6","Gramd1a", "Igfbp4","Insm1","Itgb8", "Lyz1","Mex3a","Mpp3", "Muc1", "Nrep",
  
  #"Perp","S100a6","Tm4sf1","Egfr","Gsdmc2","Krt13","Areg","Slc28a3",
  "Slc16a12", "Slc27a2", "Smoc2","Spdef","Spink4","Spp1","T","Tead2","Tff3", "Tlr2","Txndc16","Zfp503","Zfp704")
    

)

plot_genes <- purrr::imap_dfr(pathways, ~tibble::tibble(
  SYMBOL = .x,
  PATHWAY = .y
))

plot_genes$SYMBOL  <- factor(plot_genes$SYMBOL, levels = unlist(pathways))
plot_genes$PATHWAY <- factor(plot_genes$PATHWAY, levels = names(pathways))



nc_df <- nc_plot %>%
  filter(SYMBOL %in% plot_genes$SYMBOL)



make_advanced_heatmap(
  nc_df = nc_df,
  annot_df =  as.data.frame(colData(dds)),
  group_column = "group",
  group_colors = custom_cols$group,
  row_split_df = plot_genes,
  row_split_column = "PATHWAY",
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  show_row_names = TRUE
)


```

#### EV4A
```{r}
# ── Config ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
comparison_A <- "AP_vs_AKP"
comparison_B <- "AKPE_vs_AKP"
x_axis       <- "log2FoldChange AKPE vs. AKP"
y_axis       <- "log2FoldChange AP vs. AKP"

color_map <- c(
  up       = "#A73030FF",
  down     = "#003C67FF",
  up_down  = "#EFC000FF",
  down_up  = "#0073C2FF",
  highlight = "#000000"
)

# ── Extract & intersect genes ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
get_genes <- \(cmp) all_extracted[[cmp]]$de_res$allGenes

shared_genes <- intersect(
  get_genes(comparison_A)$SYMBOL,
  get_genes(comparison_B)$SYMBOL
)

# ── Helper: filter to shared genes, deduplicate, drop weak fold-changes ───────
prep_fc <- function(cmp, suffix) {
  get_genes(cmp) %>%
    filter(SYMBOL %in% shared_genes, !is.na(SYMBOL), abs(log2FoldChange) > 0.05) %>%
    distinct(SYMBOL, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(SYMBOL, log2FoldChange, padj) %>%
    rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_", suffix), c(log2FoldChange, padj))
}

# ── Build scatter data with direction categories ──────────────────────────────
scatter_plot <- prep_fc(comparison_B, "B") %>%
  left_join(prep_fc(comparison_A, "A"), by = "SYMBOL") %>%
  mutate(
    color = case_when(
      padj_B < 0.05 & log2FoldChange_B > 0 & log2FoldChange_A < 0 ~ "highlight",
      log2FoldChange_B > 0 & log2FoldChange_A > 0                  ~ "up",
      log2FoldChange_B < 0 & log2FoldChange_A < 0                  ~ "down",
      log2FoldChange_B > 0 & log2FoldChange_A < 0                  ~ "up_down",
      TRUE                                                          ~ "down_up"
    ),
    # Render highlighted/interesting points on top
    order = match(color, c("up", "down", "down_up", "up_down", "highlight"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(order)

# ── Plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ggplot(scatter_plot, aes(x = log2FoldChange_B, y = log2FoldChange_A)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = color), size = 2, alpha = 0.5, stroke = 0.3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_map) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = x_axis, y = y_axis, title = NULL) +
  xlim(-3, 5)
```



#### EV4F

```{r,  fig.asp=0.8, fig.width=8}
gs_publications <- list("Canonical Wnt Signaling" = 
                        c("Wls","Porcn", "Lrp5","Lrp6","Dvl1", "Dvl2", "Dvl3",
                          "Fzd1","Fzd2","Fzd6", "Fzd7","Fzd10",
                             "Apc", "Axin1", "Axin2", "Gsk3a", "Gsk3b", "Ctnna1", "Ctnna2",
                             "Rnf43","Znrf3" ,"Lgr5", # RSponidn ligand interction
                             "Lef1", "Tcf4"),
                        "Non-Canonical planar cell polarity (PCP)" = 
                             c("Wnt2b","Wnt3", "Wnt4", "Wnt6","Wnt7a","Wnt7b","Wnt16"),
                        
 "Wnt/STOP" =  c("Wnt5b", "Wnt11","Vangl1", "Vangl2","Ror1", "Ror2","Ptk7", "Wnt10a", "Wnt10b", "Myc"),
 "Wnt Receptor Interaction Inhibitor" =  c( "Dkk2", "Dkk3","Notum","Wif1") )


exp_df_fin <- assay(dds) %>% as.matrix()

gsvapar <- GSVA::gsvaParam(exp_df_fin, 
                     geneSets = gs_publications,
                     maxDiff = TRUE,
                     minSize = 1) 
## estimate GSVA enrichment scores for the three sets
gsva.res <- GSVA::gsva(gsvapar)





nc_df <- gsva.res %>% as.data.frame() %>% rownames_to_column("SYMBOL")

make_advanced_heatmap(
  nc_df = nc_df,
  annot_df = as.data.frame(colData(dds)),
  cols = colorRampPalette(c("#14427c", 'white',"#971814" ))(100),
  group_column = "group",
  zlim             = c(-1.5, 1.5),
  group_colors = custom_cols$group,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_row_names = TRUE
)


```

#### EV4G
```{r, fig.asp=0.6, fig.width=12}
pathways <- list(
    "Ligand"            = c("Wnt10a", "Wnt10b", "Wnt16", "Wnt2b", "Wnt3", "Wnt4", "Wnt6", 
"Wnt7a", "Wnt7b", "Wnt9a", "Wnt5b", "Wnt11"),

    "Receptor"            = c("Fzd1", "Fzd10", "Fzd2", "Fzd3", "Fzd4", "Fzd5", "Fzd6", "Fzd7", "Fzd8", "Fzd9", 
"Lrp5", "Lrp6", "Mcam"),
    "Inhibitor"        = c("Dkk2","Dkk3","Notum","Wif1")

    

)

plot_genes <- purrr::imap_dfr(pathways, ~tibble::tibble(
  SYMBOL = .x,
  PATHWAY = .y
))

plot_genes$SYMBOL  <- factor(plot_genes$SYMBOL, levels = unlist(pathways))
plot_genes$PATHWAY <- factor(plot_genes$PATHWAY, levels = names(pathways))


nc_df <- nc_plot %>%
  filter(SYMBOL %in% plot_genes$SYMBOL)



make_advanced_heatmap(
  nc_df = nc_df,
  annot_df =  as.data.frame(colData(dds)),
  group_column = "group",
  group_colors = custom_cols$group,
  row_split_df = plot_genes,
  row_split_column = "PATHWAY",
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  show_row_names = TRUE
)


```




---------------------------------------------------------------------












# Session information

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
